name: Judge mode — connect with demo tenant without credentials

planSteps.description: A judge/evaluator option is visible containing the text 'No TrueFoundry account?'
Click the button 'Continue as judge — use demo tenant' and wait up to 90 seconds for the demo tenant inventory to finish loading
The inventory browser is now shown with the exact label 'demo tenant (judge mode)' visible — confirming a credential-free connection succeeded
